final:
// // This module implements a 12-bit shift register that shifts right when shift signal is high and loads parallel data when load signal is low.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input shift,
    input [11:0] data,
    output reg [11:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= data;
        end else if (shift) begin
            q <= q << 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 12-bit shift register that shifts right when shift signal is high and loads parallel data when load signal is low.
